expectations.text: All 4 decomposition artifacts created with all required template sections
expectations.evidence: Only 1 artifact was produced: execution-backlog.md. The expected 4 artifacts (task model, conflict analysis, coverage review, execution backlog) were not all created. The outputs directory contains only execution-backlog.md.

expectations.text: Backend subtasks (ClickHouse fix, cache, parallelization) and frontend subtasks (hook, downsampling, component refactoring) are separated and can run in parallel across waves
expectations.evidence: Backend tasks (1.1 Fix retention bug, 1.2 Query limits, 1.3 ChartCache in Wave 1; 2.1 Parallelize service, 2.2 Wire cache, 2.3 ClickHouse tests in Wave 2) and frontend tasks (1.4 LTTB downsample, 1.5 ChartGrid lazy loading in Wave 1; 3.1 useChartQuery hook, 3.2 Refactor Overview, 3.3 Downsample in Chart in Wave 3) are clearly separated. The Parallel Execution Plan tables explicitly show backend and frontend streams running simultaneously.

expectations.text: Retention cohort bug fix (queries.go:67-85) is an independent subtask or part of a foundation subtask with no blocking dependencies
expectations.evidence: Task 1.1 'Fix Retention Cohort Bug' explicitly targets queries.go lines 67-85, states 'Dependencies: None', and is placed in Wave 1 (Independent Foundations) with the note 'All tasks in this wave can execute in parallel. They have zero dependencies on each other.'

expectations.text: Cache subtask (chart_cache.go) is correctly identified as a dependency for the service parallelization subtask
expectations.evidence: Task 1.3 creates 'internal/cache/chart_cache.go'. Task 2.1 'Parallelize Analytics Service with errgroup and Cache Integration' lists 'Task 1.3 (ChartCache must exist)' as a dependency. The dependency graph also shows '1.3 Create ChartCache -> 2.1 Parallelize service'.

expectations.text: Frontend useChartQuery hook is correctly identified as a dependency for Overview.tsx refactoring
expectations.evidence: Task 3.2 'Refactor Overview.tsx for Per-Chart Queries' explicitly lists 'Task 3.1 (useChartQuery hook must exist)' as a dependency. The dependency graph shows '3.1 useChartQuery hook -> 3.2 Refactor Overview'.

expectations.text: Conflict zones identified where service.go integration depends on both cache and ClickHouse changes
expectations.evidence: Task 2.1 does list dependencies on Task 1.1 (retention bug fix in queries.go), Task 1.2 (query limits in queries.go), and Task 1.3 (ChartCache in chart_cache.go), showing service.go depends on both cache and ClickHouse changes. However, there is no dedicated conflict zones analysis artifact or section. The dependency information exists only within the task's dependency list, not as an explicit conflict zone identification with merge risk or coordination notes.

expectations.text: Coverage reviewer returns COVERAGE_OK — all 7 acceptance criteria mapped
expectations.evidence: No coverage review artifact exists. There is no COVERAGE_OK signal anywhere in the output. The execution-backlog.md has an 'Acceptance Criteria (Overall)' section listing 10 criteria, but no formal coverage mapping or reviewer pass/fail output was produced.

expectations.text: Execution waves maximize parallelism: independent backend and frontend streams can run simultaneously
expectations.evidence: 4 waves are defined. Wave 1 has 5 independent tasks (3 backend, 2 frontend) all running in parallel. Waves 2 (backend) and 3 (frontend) are explicitly designed to run simultaneously. The Parallel Execution Plan provides concrete schedules for 2-developer and 4-developer teams, showing backend and frontend streams execute in parallel throughout.
